summary: Comprehensive testing of CineWorld Studio's MVP completed successfully. Backend API testing achieved 100% pass rate (24/24 tests). Frontend UI testing confirmed core functionality including user registration/login, navigation, and film creation wizard step 1. All major features are working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Genre dropdown selection has timeout issues in step 1, may be due to dropdown overlay timing

passed_tests: User Registration (nickname, production house name, owner name)
Dashboard page loads with user stats and $10,000,000 funds
Top navigation bar works (My Films, Social, Chat, Statistics)
Film creation wizard - step 1 (title input and basic setup)
Statistics page displays personal and global stats
All backend API endpoints (24/24 tests passed)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (Minor dropdown timing issue in film wizard)
